item.title: FZF for the win!
item.author: Author
item.description: If you spend time in the terminal, then you probably will like fzf.

item.title: Presenting at "The Big Day In"
item.author: Author
item.description: I had the opportunity to present at "The Big Day In" conference hosted at the University of Technology Sydney, sharing some of the developments done by Animal Logic's R&D department.

item.title: Hello shadertoy
item.author: Author
item.description: Experiments while tipping my toes into this wonderful sandbox to write fragment shaders right on the webbrowser.

item.title: Animal Logic's USDMaya integration
item.author: Author
item.description: At Animal Logic, we have been working on an open source integration of USD in Maya, in this post you can see a short demo of how things are going so far.

item.title: psystem
item.author: Author
item.description: Let's develop a simple particle system in python, from scratch.

item.title: Naming
item.author: Author
item.description: Join me on this video series coding a naming convention manager step by step, 10 minutes at a time.

item.title: The Lego Journey
item.author: Author
item.description: It's a wrap! The Lego Batman Movie is out and Ninjago on its way, time for a retrospective.

item.title: mscreen
item.author: Author
item.description: Drawing OpenGL in Maya was never easier.

item.title: The future of rigging
item.author: Author
item.description: A revolution is coming, are you ready?

item.title: Testing as a medium
item.author: Author
item.description: Introductory talk to software development testing
